name: Nova
description: A burst damage Mage who can ambush enemies from Stealth.
title: Dominion Ghost
info: November "Nova" Terra is a ghost of the Terran Dominion and one of the most powerful psionic soldiers ever known. Nova is highly focused, determined, and extremely deadly. Even Jim Raynor wouldn't want to be caught in her crosshairs.

Nova.name: Snipe
Nova.description: Deal 230 (+4% per level) damage to the first enemy hit.  Passive: Hitting an enemy Hero with Snipe permanently increases the damage of Snipe by 6%, stacking up to 30%. Gain an additional 25% damage bonus at maximum stacks. All stacks are lost if Snipe fails to hit an enemy.

Nova.name: Pinning Shot
Nova.description: Deal 100 (+4% per level) damage to an enemy and Slow them by 40% for 2.25 seconds.

Nova.name: Holo Decoy
Nova.description: Create a Decoy for 5 seconds with 100% of Nova's current Health that attacks enemies, dealing 10% of Nova's base damage. Whenever a Decoy takes damage, it deals that amount of damage to itself, effectively doubling the damage it takes.  Using this Ability does not break Stealth.

Nova.name: Triple Tap
Nova.description: Locks in on the target Hero, then fires 3 shots that hit the first Hero or Structure they come in contact with for 372 (+4% per level) damage each.

Nova.name: Precision Strike
Nova.description: After a 1.5 second delay, deals 435 (+4% per level) damage to enemies within an area. Unlimited range.

Nova.name: Permanent Cloak
Nova.description: Gain Stealth when out of combat for 3 seconds. Taking damage, attacking, using Abilities, or Channeling ends Stealth. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.  Passive: Gain 15% Movement Speed while Stealthed.

Nova.name: Ghost Protocol
Nova.description: Activate to instantly grant Stealth to Nova and spawn a Holo Decoy at her location. Nova is Unrevealable for the first 0.5 seconds when Stealthed by Ghost Protocol.

1.name: Longshot
1.description: Increases the cast range of Pinning Shot by 30%. Pinning Shot also increases the range of Nova's next Basic Attack by 2.3.

1.name: Covert Ops
1.description: After being Stealthed for 2 seconds, Pinning Shot's Slow is increased to 60% and costs no Mana. Bonus is lost after losing Stealth for 1 second.

1.name: Advanced Cloaking
1.description: After being Stealthed for 1 second, gain an additional 10% Movement Speed. While Stealthed, regenerate 6 Mana per second.

4.name: Rapid Projection
4.description: Reduces Holo Decoy's cooldown and Mana cost by 60%.

4.name: Holo Stability
4.description: Increase the cast range of Holo Decoy by 100% and its duration by 120%.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Ghost Protocol by 15 seconds.

4.name: Covert Mission
4.description: Enemy Minions killed near Nova grant a stack of Bribe. Hero Takedowns grant 10 stacks of Bribe. Use 25 stacks to bribe a Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries. Maximum of 100 stacks. If a camp is defeated entirely with Bribe, the camp respawns 50% faster.

7.name: Perfect Shot
7.description: Hitting an enemy with Snipe reduces its cooldown by 2 seconds and refunds half its Mana cost, doubled against enemy Heroes.

7.name: One in the Chamber
7.description: After using an Ability, Nova's next Basic Attack within 3 seconds deals 65% additional damage.

7.name: Anti-Armor Shells
7.description: Nova's Basic Attacks deal 250% damage and decrease the Physical Armor of Heroic targets by 15 for 4 seconds, but her Attack Speed is proportionally slower.

10.name: Triple Tap
10.description: Locks in on the target Hero, then fires 3 shots that hit the first Hero or Structure they come in contact with for 372 (+4% per level) damage each.

10.name: Precision Strike
10.description: After a 1.5 second delay, deals 435 (+4% per level) damage to enemies within an area. Unlimited range.

13.name: Psionic Efficiency
13.description: Snipe's range is increased by 15% and hitting a Hero grants an additional stack of Precision Sniper.

13.name: Double Tap
13.description: Pinning Shot now has 2 charges, but its cooldown is increased by 2 seconds.

13.name: Ionic Force Field
13.description: Gain 25 Armor for 3 seconds after losing Stealth.

16.name: Explosive Round
16.description: Snipe also deals 90% damage to enemies near the impact.

16.name: Crippling Shot
16.description: Pinning Shot lowers a Hero's Armor by 20 for the duration of the Slow, causing them to take 20% increased damage.

16.name: Lethal Decoy
16.description: Increases the damage Holo Decoy deals to 30% of Nova's damage.

20.name: Fast Reload
20.description: Triple Tap's cooldown is reset if it kills an enemy Hero.

20.name: Precision Barrage
20.description: Precision Strike gains a 2nd charge and its cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds.

20.name: Apollo Suit
20.description: Reduce the cooldown of Permanent Cloak by 2 seconds.

20.name: Rewind
20.description: Activate to reset the cooldowns of your Basic Abilities.

tooltipMarkup.GenericRewindHotbar: Activate to reset the cooldowns of your Basic Abilities.
tooltipMarkup.NovaAntiArmorShellsTalent: Nova's Basic Attacks deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers">250%</c> damage and decrease the Physical Armor of Heroic targets by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,NovaAntiArmorShellsArmorDebuff,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Basic]"/></c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NovaAntiArmorShellsArmorDebuff,Duration"/></c> seconds, but her Attack Speed is proportionally slower.
tooltipMarkup.NovaCovertMissionTalent: Enemy Minions killed near Nova grant a stack of Bribe. Hero Takedowns grant <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10 </c>stacks of Bribe. Use <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,NovaCovertMissionRemove20Token,Value"/></c> stacks to bribe a Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries. Maximum of <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NovaCovertMissionTokenCounter,Max"/></c> stacks. If a camp is defeated entirely with Bribe, the camp respawns <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> faster.
tooltipMarkup.NovaCovertOpsTalent: After being Stealthed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NovaPinningShotCovertOpsTimer,Duration"/></c> seconds, Pinning Shot's Slow is increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,NovaPinningShotCovertOpsSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> and costs no Mana. Bonus is lost after losing Stealth for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NovaPinningShotCovertOpsActiveTimed,Duration"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.NovaGhostProtocol: Activate to instantly grant Stealth to Nova and spawn a Holo Decoy at her location. Nova is Unrevealable for the first <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NovaGhostProtocolUnrevealableCloak,Duration"precision="2"/></c> seconds when Stealthed by Ghost Protocol.
tooltipMarkup.NovaGhostProtocolApolloSuitTalent: Reduce the cooldown of Permanent Cloak by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,NovaApolloSuit,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NovaHoloDecoy: Create a Decoy for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NovaHoloDecoyTimedLife,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds with <c val="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> of Nova's current Health that attacks enemies, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,StormSnipeDamage,Amount/Effect,NovaHoloDecoySnipeDamage,Amount"player="0" precision="1"/>%</c> of Nova's base damage. Whenever a Decoy takes damage, it deals that amount of damage to itself, effectively doubling the damage it takes.<n/><n/>Using this Ability does not break Stealth.
tooltipMarkup.NovaHoloDecoyHoloStabilityTalent: Increase the cast range of Holo Decoy by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,NovaHoloStability,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value/Abil,NovaHoloDecoy,Range"player="0"precision="0"/>%</c> and its duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,NovaHoloStability,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value/Behavior,NovaHoloDecoyTimedLife,Duration"/>%</c>.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce the cooldown of Ghost Protocol by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Talent,NovaHoloStability,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[3].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NovaHoloDecoyLethalDecoyTalent: Increases the damage Holo Decoy deals to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="10*(1+Effect,NovaHoloDecoySnipeDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[LethalDecoy].Modifier)" precision="1"player="0"/>%</c> of Nova's damage.
tooltipMarkup.NovaHoloDecoyRapidProjectionTalent: Reduces Holo Decoy's cooldown and Mana cost by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.NovaIonicForceFieldTalent: Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NovaIonicForceFieldArmorBuff,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NovaIonicForceFieldArmorBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds after losing Stealth.
tooltipMarkup.NovaOneintheChamberTalent: After using an Ability, Nova's next Basic Attack within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NovaOneintheChamber,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,NovaOneintheChamber,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]"/>%</c> additional damage.
tooltipMarkup.NovaPerfectShotTalent: Hitting an enemy with Snipe reduces its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Effect,NovaPerfectShotNonHeroicModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds and refunds half its Mana cost, doubled against enemy Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.NovaPermanentCloak: Gain Stealth when out of combat for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GenericCloakRevealer,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds. Taking damage, attacking, using Abilities, or Channeling ends Stealth. Remaining stationary for at least <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HeroGenericStationaryExtraStealthCountdown,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,NovaPermanentCloakMovementSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Movement Speed while Stealthed.
tooltipMarkup.NovaPermanentCloakSniperAdvancedCloaking: After being Stealthed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,NovaAdvancedCloakingAccumulator,StepLoops/16"/></c> second, gain an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,NovaAdvancedCloakingAccumulator,MultiplierPerStep"/>%</c> Movement Speed. While Stealthed, regenerate <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,NovaAdvancedCloaking,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> Mana per second.
tooltipMarkup.NovaPinningShot: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,PinningShotDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to an enemy and Slow them by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,PinningShotSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*(-100)" player="0"precision="2"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,PinningShotSlow,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NovaPinningShotCripplingShotTalent: Pinning Shot lowers a Hero's Armor by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,NovaPinningShotCripplingShotArmorDecrease,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> for the duration of the Slow, causing them to take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,NovaPinningShotCripplingShotArmorDecrease,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/>%</c> increased damage.
tooltipMarkup.NovaPinningShotDoubleTapTalent: Pinning Shot now has <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges, but its cooldown is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,NovaMasteryDoubleTap,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NovaPinningShotLongshotTalent: Increases the cast range of Pinning Shot by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,NovaMasteryLongshot,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value/Abil,NovaPinningShot,Range"player="0"precision="0"/>%</c>. Pinning Shot also increases the range of Nova's next Basic Attack by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NovaLongshotRangeBuff,Modification.WeaponRange" precision="1"/></c>.
tooltipMarkup.NovaPrecisionStrike: After a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,PrecisionStrikeWarningCreatePersistent,ExpireDelay" precision="1"/></c> second delay, deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,PrecisionStrikeDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies within an area. Unlimited range.
tooltipMarkup.NovaPrecisionStrikePrecisionBarrageTalen: Precision Strike gains a <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2nd</c> charge and its cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,NovaMasteryPrecisionBarrage,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NovaSnipe: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,StormSnipeDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to the first enemy hit.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Hitting an enemy Hero with Snipe permanently increases the damage of Snipe by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,NovaPrecisionSniperAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c>, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,NovaPrecisionSniperAccumulator,MaxAccumulation"/>%</c>. Gain an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,StormSnipeDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[PrecisionSniperMax].Modifier"/>%</c> damage bonus at maximum stacks. All stacks are lost if Snipe fails to hit an enemy.
tooltipMarkup.NovaSnipeExplosiveRoundTalent: Snipe also deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(1+Effect,SnipeExplosiveDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[ExplosiveSnipe].Modifier)"/>%</c> damage to enemies near the impact.
tooltipMarkup.NovaSnipePsionicEfficiencyTalent: Snipe's range is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> and hitting a Hero grants an additional stack of Precision Sniper.
tooltipMarkup.NovaTripleTap: Locks in on the target Hero, then fires <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="[d ref='Effect,TripleTapLaunchPersistent,PeriodCount' player='0'/]"/></c> shots that hit the first Hero or Structure they come in contact with for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TripleTapMissileDamage,Amount"/></c> damage each.
tooltipMarkup.NovaTripleTapFastReloadTalent: Triple Tap's cooldown is reset if it kills an enemy Hero.
